en.extract:
The Louisiade flowerpecker (Dicaeum nitidum) is a species of bird in the family Dicaeidae.
It is found on Tagula, Misima and Rossel islands.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''Louisiade flowerpecker''' ('''''Dicaeum nitidum''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Dicaeidae]].
It is found on [[Tagula Island|Tagula]], [[Misima Island|Misima]] and [[Rossel Island|Rossel]] islands.

Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].

zh.extract:
路易啄花鸟（学名：Dicaeum nitidum），是啄花鸟科啄花鸟属的一种，为巴布亚新几内亚的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
路易啄花鸟的栖息地为亚热带或热带的湿润低地林。
